es.name: Calculadora Retorno Acciones
es.desc: Calcula Retorno total (%) = ((Precio final + Dividendos - Precio inicial) / Precio inicial) × 100. Ejemplo: Compra a 50 €, venta a 62 €, dividendos 1,50 € = Retorno =...
es.seo_description: Calcula Retorno total (%) = ((Precio final + Dividendos - Precio inicial) / Precio inicial) × 100. Ejemplo: Compra a 50 €, venta a 62 €, dividendos 1,50 € = ...
es.example_label: Calculating total return on stock bought at €45.50, sold at €58.75, with €3.20 dividends received.
es.result_context: The retorno_pct of {retorno_pct}% is your total return including dividends. The ganancia of {ganancia} is profit per share.
es.formula_display: Total Return% = [(Sale Price - Purchase Price + Dividends) ÷ Purchase Price] × 100
mistakes: Forgetting to include dividends in total return calculation
Not accounting for transaction costs and taxes on gains
Comparing returns without considering holding period
